positive: A detailed, stylized graphic illustration of a majestic woodland creature, perhaps a stylized fox or a mythical forest spirit, surrounded by oversized, lush tropical flora and geometric patterns. The main subject should have a clean, strong silhouette and vibrant color accents against a muted, earthy background. Use a blend of Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print style and modern vector graphic minimalism. The composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern or a single chest print. Focus on high contrast between the subject's outline and the background elements. Studio lighting, crisp lines, perfect symmetry, intricate details, highly rendered, designed for screen printing.
negative: blurry, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, logo, low resolution, poor contrast, jpeg artifacts, noise, dirty, grayscale, photo, realistic photo
